subcodes.first_line: God maketh mention of His servant that he may rejoice within himself, and this, verily, is a bounty most great. Seek thou the grace of thy Lord in all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عبده لیفرح فی نفسه و ان هذا لفضل عظیما ان ابتغ فضل مولاک فی کل
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @idolatry, @praise and encouragement
